# React Leaflet Map Project - Setup Instructions

## Project Overview
A React application with Leaflet map integration for displaying geographical data. Built with Vite for optimal performance.

## Completed Steps
- [x] Clarify Project Requirements: React + Leaflet + Vite
- [x] Scaffold the Project: React with Vite
- [x] Customize the Project: Add map components and styling
- [x] Install Required Extensions: None needed
- [x] Compile the Project: Dependencies installed successfully
- [x] Create and Run Task: Setup dev server
- [x] Launch the Project: Start development mode at http://localhost:5173
- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete: README.md finalized

## Key Dependencies
- react
- react-dom
- leaflet
- react-leaflet
- vite
